prompt: Assess the scaffolding state of /Users/josh_folder/Open-ClaudeCode and tell me what's missing for autonomous agent operation

assertions.name: identifies-project-type
assertions.check: Report identifies the project as a TypeScript/Node.js CLI project

assertions.name: notes-no-ci
assertions.check: Report notes absence of CI/CD pipeline (no .github/workflows, no Jenkinsfile, no Makefile)

assertions.name: notes-no-tests
assertions.check: Report notes absence of test infrastructure

assertions.name: recognizes-existing-observability
assertions.check: Report recognizes existing telemetry/analytics/logging infrastructure in the source code

assertions.name: provides-concrete-recommendations
assertions.check: Report provides concrete, actionable improvement recommendations (not just vague statements)
